title: Chicken Fried
why_this_song: Chicken Fried by Zac Brown Band (2008) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 7 times; first heard in: "You know I like my chicken fried"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Well I was raised up beneath the shade of a Georgia pine"

Appears 5 times; first heard in: "You know I like my chicken fried"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: See the love in my woman's eyes
Feel the touch of a precious child
Well I was raised up beneath the shade of a Georgia pine
Sweet tea pecan pie and homemade wine

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "know" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "know" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "well" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "well" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You know I like my chicken fried
Raise your glasses for a toast
Cold beer on a Friday night

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: A cold beer on a Friday night
Feel the touch of a precious child

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Chicken Fried" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Chicken Fried" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Chicken Fried", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Chicken Fried", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Chicken Fried" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Chicken Fried" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
